narrative:
30Thornw (precinct in Perry County) has 489 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.2 percentage points.
